events.text: Goal!  England 0, Italy 1. Claudio Marchisio (Italy) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Marco Verratti   following a corner.
Goal!  England 1, Italy 1. Daniel Sturridge (England) right footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Wayne Rooney with a cross.
Goal!  England 1, Italy 2. Mario Balotelli (Italy) header from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antonio Candreva with a cross.
Raheem Sterling (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
